ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., XS, SM, MD) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Code representing the size in a standard format */,
  "chest_bust" TEXT /* Measurement of the chest or bust */,
  "cup_size" TEXT /* Cup size for bra fitting */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Measurement of the waist */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Measurement of the hips */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Measurement of the inseam */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Measurement of the sleeve length */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., inches, centimeters) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "measurement_unit_preference" TEXT /* Preferred measurement unit of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_sizes" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size saved by the customer */,
  "chest_measurement" TEXT /* Customer's chest measurement */,
  "waist_measurement" TEXT /* Customer's waist measurement */,
  "hip_measurement" TEXT /* Customer's hip measurement */,
  "fit_preference" TEXT /* Customer's preferred fit type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size is the customer's default size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the brand */,
  "brand_website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand producing the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "available_sizes" TEXT /* List of available sizes for the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with this item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the order item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated customer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
